summary:
As a Technical Lead and Senior Software Engineer with over a decade of experience in software development, I
specialize in .NET technologies, including .NET Framework, .NET Core,C# and SQL Server. I hold a Bachelor's degree in
Computer Science and a Master's degree in Engineering and Technology Management, which provide me with a solid
foundation in both technical and strategic aspects of software development.
With a strong understanding of software design principles and deep familiarity with best practices such as SOLID, DRY,
and design patterns, I design scalable, maintainable, and high-performance solutions. My technical expertise extends
across a diverse tech stack, including Angular, React, HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, MVC, RESTful APIs, Web API, SOAP, MVVM,
Docker, Git, PL/SQL, PostgreSQL, .Net, C# , Kafka and Agile methodologies and Azure Cloud.
I have consistently delivered value to organizations by driving architectural innovation and software development
excellence. In addition to my technical contributions, I have successfully led small to mid-sized teams, helping them
unlock their full potential and achieve their goals. My holistic approach, from design to implementation, fosters
collaboration, accelerates delivery, and ensures high-quality, future-proof solutions that align with business objectives.

education.degree: ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY MANAGEMENT – Dogus University

Architected and implemented a suite of Azure Services (Functions, Storage, Cosmos DB, Key Vault) for a scalable cloud solution.
